value.found_quote: ### Behavior and limits ... | Up to 16 concurrent agents, fewer on machines with limited CPU cores | Bounds local resource use | ... | 1,000 agents total per run | Prevents runaway loops |
value.rationale: The page contains a "Behavior and limits" section listing constraints including "Up to 16 concurrent agents" and "1,000 agents total per run," matching the claim. These are described as current runtime constraints for dynamic workflows, which are available on all paid plans.
